title: Elaphoglossum prestonii
taxonomy: Elaphoglossum prestonii belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae and is classified under the kingdom Plantae. More specifically, it falls under the division Pteridophyta, which includes ferns and their allies. Within this division, Elaphoglossum prestonii is classified as a member of the class Polypodiopsida. The species is further classified as an order Polypodiales and a family Dryopteridaceae. Its classification is also supported by its characteristics, such as being a terrestrial fern with simple leaves.

intro: Elaphoglossum prestonii is a species of epiphytic fern, native to Central and South America, characterized by its delicate fronds and compact growth habit. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that may aid in wound healing and the management of chronic conditions such as arthritis. Bioactive constituents of Elaphoglossum prestonii include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which are thought to contribute to its medicinal properties.
